task_completion.description: Wallops_CDA ground station is corrected, set as default, and bound to the POES_Tracking module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the trajectory, look for the Ground Station configuration for 'Wallops_CDA'. Latitude must be 37.9402 (N), Longitude 75.4576 W (or -75.4576), Altitude 15, Weather KWAL. Also look for it being set as the default ground station (e.g., in Edit -> Preferences -> Ground Stations) and selected as the ground station for the POES_Tracking module.

task_completion.description: The POES_Tracking module tracks only the 6 specified POES satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the module configuration or main UI, the satellites must be exactly NOAA-15, NOAA-18, NOAA-19, METOP-B, METOP-C, and SUOMI NPP. Non-POES satellites (ISS, HST, GPS) must be removed.

task_completion.description: The module uses a Map and Table layout with a topographical map and solar terminator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the module configuration or main UI, the layout is 'Map and Table'. The map background is topographical (showing terrain colors), and the solar terminator (day/night shadow) is enabled.

task_completion.description: The satellite table shows Azimuth, Elevation, Range, and Range Rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the list configuration or the final satellite table, the columns must include Azimuth, Elevation, Range, and Range Rate.

task_completion.description: Global preferences are set to UTC time and Metric units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Edit -> Preferences -> General -> Number/Date formats, 'Metric' and 'UTC' should be selected. Alternatively, verify in the main UI that time is in UTC and distances are in km.

task_completion.description: Pass predictions for METOP-C from Wallops_CDA are saved to ~/Documents/METOP_C_passes.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Upcoming passes' window for METOP-C showing observer Wallops_CDA. Look for a save file dialog where the agent saves the text file to '/home/ga/Documents/METOP_C_passes.txt'.

task_completion.description: GPredict is maximized with the POES_Tracking module visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshot, the GPredict window takes up the entire screen and the 'POES_Tracking' module is the active tab.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure settings rather than editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through GPredict menus, preferences, and module configuration dialogs, rather than using a text editor or terminal to modify .qth, .mod, or .cfg files.

integrity.description: Pass predictions were generated by GPredict's internal engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should right-click METOP-C, select 'Future Passes', and use the 'Save' button in the dialog, rather than creating or downloading a text file manually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Wallops_CDA ground station should have latitude 37.9402°N, longitude 75.4576°W (stored as -75.4576 in GPredict, negative means West), altitude 15m, and weather station code KWAL. The correct POES fleet satellites are: NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), METOP-C (43689), and SUOMI NPP (37849). The wrong satellites to remove are ISS (25544), HST (20580), and GPS BIIR-13 (28474). The pass prediction file for METOP-C should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/METOP_C_passes.txt. GPredict's preferences should be set to Metric units and UTC time. The module layout should be 'Map and Table' with the topographical map background and solar terminator line enabled. The satellite table should show Azimuth, Elevation, Range, and Range Rate columns.
